_comment: HubSpot custom property definitions for the Pemo GTM lead scoring system. Run setup.js to create these in your HubSpot portal.

properties.name: pemo_lead_score
properties.label: Pemo Lead Score
properties.description: Numeric lead score 0-100 from the Pemo scoring engine.

properties.name: pemo_lead_tier
properties.label: Pemo Lead Tier
properties.description: Hot (80+), Warm (50-79), Cold (<50). Disqualified leads forced to Cold.

properties.name: pemo_qualification_summary
properties.label: AI Qualification Summary
properties.description: LLM-generated 2-3 sentence summary explaining the score and rep next-step.

properties.name: pemo_score_rationale
properties.label: Score Rationale (deterministic)
properties.description: Component-by-component breakdown of how the score was computed.

properties.name: pemo_firmographic_score
properties.label: Firmographic Subscore
properties.description: Weighted firmographic component (max 35).

properties.name: pemo_intent_score
properties.label: Intent Subscore
properties.description: Weighted intent component (max 30).

properties.name: pemo_source_score
properties.label: Source Quality Subscore
properties.description: Weighted source-quality component (max 20).

properties.name: pemo_engagement_score
properties.label: Engagement Subscore
properties.description: Weighted engagement-recency component (max 15).

properties.name: pemo_confidence
properties.label: Score Confidence
properties.description: Data-completeness confidence (0-1). Below 0.6 flags for human review.

properties.name: pemo_disqualified
properties.label: Disqualified
properties.description: True if negative intent signals (unsubscribe, not interested) detected.

properties.name: pemo_score_version
properties.label: Score Version
properties.description: Version of the scoring algorithm used. Enables forward-compatibility when weights are retuned.

properties.name: pemo_last_scored_at
properties.label: Last Scored At
properties.description: Timestamp of the most recent scoring run.

properties.name: pemo_lead_source_channel
properties.label: Lead Source Channel
properties.description: Normalized inbound channel for routing & analytics.

properties.name: pemo_country_tier
properties.label: Country ICP Tier
properties.description: ICP region classification for routing.

properties.name: pemo_language
properties.label: Lead Language
properties.description: Detected language for outreach personalization & rep routing.

properties.name: pemo_raw_message
properties.label: Original Message
properties.description: Untransformed message body from the inbound form/channel.

properties.name: pemo_trello_card_url
properties.label: Trello Card URL
properties.description: Link to the Trello card on the tier board for visual ops.

properties.name: pemo_assigned_rep_email
properties.label: Assigned Rep (Email)
properties.description: Email of the sales rep assigned via round-robin within geo/language bucket.

properties.name: pemo_form_intent
properties.label: Form Intent
properties.description: Explicit intent declared on the inbound form (demo, pricing, info, support).

properties.name: pemo_inbound_source_shape
properties.label: Inbound Payload Shape
properties.description: Detected inbound payload shape (website_form, partner_referral, event, generic). Audit field for the normalization layer.

properties.name: pemo_request_id
properties.label: Ingestion Request ID
properties.description: Unique ID of the intake request. Use to trace a lead back through n8n logs.

properties.name: pemo_visit_count
properties.label: Visit Count
properties.description: Number of website visits prior to lead submission (engagement signal).

properties.name: pemo_existing_customer
properties.label: Existing Pemo Customer (Contact)
properties.description: Contact-level dedup flag. True if matched to an existing customer at intake.

properties.name: pemo_company_size_band
properties.label: Company Size Band (Contact)
properties.description: ICP size band classification (denormalized at Contact level for routing).

properties.name: pemo_tech_stack_signals
properties.label: Tech Stack Signals
properties.description: Comma-separated list of accounting/payment tools detected via enrichment.

properties.name: pemo_replied
properties.label: Lead Replied
properties.description: True once a reply (from any channel) is detected by WF-REPLY. Halts active sequences.

properties.name: pemo_replied_at
properties.label: Replied At
properties.description: Timestamp of the first detected reply. Set by WF-REPLY.

properties.name: pemo_sequence_step
properties.label: Outreach Sequence Step
properties.description: Last step sent (warm_day_0, warm_day_3, warm_day_7, cold_day_0, hot_initial). Used by WF-MONITORING to spot stuck leads.

properties.name: pemo_company_size_band
properties.label: Company Size Band
properties.description: ICP size band classification.

properties.name: pemo_industry_fit
properties.label: Industry Fit
properties.description: ICP industry classification.

properties.name: pemo_tech_stack
properties.label: Detected Tech Stack
properties.description: Accounting/payment tools detected via enrichment (comma-separated).

properties.name: pemo_tech_stack_signal
properties.label: Tech Stack Signal
properties.description: What the detected stack signals about buying readiness.

properties.name: pemo_existing_customer
properties.label: Existing Pemo Customer
properties.description: True if matched to an existing customer record (dedup signal).
